51a51c1f3561642414006fde_19:
Really now, you are becoming tedious. I have matters to attend to. You may benefit from them or I will have McKlusky feed you to something and bury the excretion. 

What do you believe Project Aegis does?
51a51c1f3561642414006fde_27: Thank you, Marie-Louise. You have confirmed the identity of your rescuer and given me reason to forgive them for their trespasses against me.
51a51c1f3561642414006fde_32:
I see. It was you and your crippled little friend who leaked Aegis to this outsider. We will speak of it later - in private.

Now then, there are people I wish you to meet - the "committee" my daughter alluded to. This is a rare opportunity for someone of the streets such as yourself. I urge you to behave. We will adjourn to the library.
51bf90fb623331f411004d08_3: Very clean. I believe our test of Project Aegis was a success. Herr Brackhaus is having it weaponized now for distribution to Knight Errant forces. The authorities are going to have a great many questions about this incident and I will need to provide details. The Universal Brotherhood has a great many chapter-houses and they must be dealt with immediately.
51bf90fb623331f411004d08_27: I do indeed - and I believe you have already undergone the required interview. Very well, report to work as Vice President of Telestrian Industries Corporation Security on Monday.
51bf90fb623331f411004d08_29: Unfortunately, someone of your kind is not an appropriate fit for a Telestrian Industries Corporation executive. I’m sure you understand. However, I believe whomever fills the position would benefit from an Executive Consultant of your caliber. The position will pay quite handsomely, I assure you. Report to work on Monday.
449469043064342809005bdf_13: You're funny, tough guy. Maybe, we’ll find another time to do a little dance later, you and me.
51d4c256623331ac180039b4_2:
I guess that concludes the story of you and the Dead Man’s Switch, huh? 

Y’know, I’ve been thinking, maybe you should stay in Seattle awhile. There’s plenty of ways folks like us can get into trouble here - you only skimmed the surface.
51d08b6e3236646019001e67_0: I'm glad to see you're all right. I was afraid they'd be carting you back to me in pieces.
51a8bde6356164d017006e96_3:
You mistake your importance. No, I was not spying on you. Until Mr. Telestrian’s summons, you were beneath my notice. I saw only a customer.

Now, do you require my magic?
51a8bde6356164d017006e96_4:
Are any of us? 

Yes, I am here. And at the Seamstresses Union. And a myriad of other places. On to the work at hand. Do you require my magic?
26ed5b3a306466b40a0018d7_4: Hey, you're not leaving me down here!
860024c7303031e4160044bd_0~g0: Van Graas is busy talking on his commlink, checking his heads-up display, and motioning to a runner standing nearby - all at the same time. He's an intense little man. You get the sense that he likes to look busy.

Talk to me.

51e06bac62333130140054df_0: Attention all personnel. We have a dangerous patient loose inside the facility. The subject is armed and extremely dangerous, and may be coordinating with other violent offenders. Use all necessary force.
